name: Delete all Valhalla-imported rules from the Sekoia Rules Catalog
description: Enumerates the Sekoia Rules Catalog and deletes every rule whose top-level `author` field matches the configured marker (default `valhalla-integration` — Sekoia stamps this on every rule created by the sync trigger's API key). Never touches user-created rules or Sekoia's verified catalog. Defaults to dry-run — set `confirm=true` for deletions to actually run.

confirm.title: Confirm deletion
confirm.description: Must be true for rules to actually be deleted. When false, the trigger emits a report of what WOULD be deleted and makes no DELETE calls.

author.title: Author marker to match on
author.description: Deletes only rules whose top-level `author` field equals this value. Sekoia auto-populates `author` with the integration slug for API-created rules.

frequency.title: Re-run frequency in seconds
frequency.description: How often to re-check the catalog for anything left to delete. Once the tenant is clean this is a no-op. Default 24h.
